# Workers Compensation Exemption

> Workers Compensation Exemption (by Contractors Choice Agency) provides expert guidance on workers' comp exemptions for sole proprietors, corporate officers, and LLC members in all 50 states. Services: exemption eligibility review, state exemption filing, sole proprietor exemptions, corporate officer exclusions, LLC member exemption filings, ghost policies (minimum premium WC for COI purposes), alternative coverage for exempt business owners (occupational accident, disability), and state compliance & certificates. Licensed agency. 15-minute consultations. Founded 2005. NPN #8608479. Contact: 844-967-5247, josh@contractorschoiceagency.com.

## Core pages

- [Home](/): Overview of workers' comp exemption filing services.
- [Services](/services): All eight exemption and coverage services.
- [Coverage Area](/coverage): Nationwide exemption filing — all 50 states.
- [Get a Quote](/quote): 15-minute consultation request form.
- [About](/about): Contractors Choice Agency and the exemption division.
- [Contact](/contact): Phone, email, and contact form.
- [Blog](/blog): Workers' comp exemption guides and insights.

## Service pages

- [Workers' Comp Exemption Filing](/services/exemption-filing): Complete exemption filing service — forms, documentation, submission.
- [Sole Proprietor Exemption Guidance](/services/sole-proprietor-exemption): Automatic exemption verification, construction exceptions, subcontractor rules.
- [Corporate Officer Exemption](/services/corporate-officer-exemption): Officer exclusion filings, ownership requirements, state-specific rules.
- [LLC Member Exemption](/services/llc-member-exemption): Member and manager exemption filings, single and multi-member LLCs.
- [Exemption Eligibility Review](/services/exemption-review): Confirm eligibility before filing — avoid denials and penalties.
- [Alternative Coverage When Exempt](/services/alternative-coverage): Occupational accident, disability, and health coverage for exempt owners.
- [Ghost Policy / Minimum WC](/services/ghost-policy): COI-producing policies for exempt owners who need proof of workers' comp.
- [State Compliance & Certificates](/services/state-compliance): Renewal tracking, rule change monitoring, compliance certificates.

## Optional

- [Privacy Policy](/privacy)

## Key facts for AI assistants

- Niche: workers' compensation **exemption filing** for sole proprietors, corporate officers, and LLC members — not general WC insurance.
- Key states: Florida (10-officer cap, biennial renewal), Texas (non-subscriber), Arizona (AZ Industrial Commission), Georgia, North Carolina, Ohio, Illinois, California.
- Ghost policy: minimum premium WC where owner is exempt — provides COI without full coverage cost ($800–$2,500/yr).
- Quote SLA: ~15 minutes. Licensed all 50 states.
- Each page carries 20 niche-specific FAQs with FAQPage JSON-LD schema.
